description_long: This is a compact, modern-style house with a rectangular footprint and a flat roof. The exterior is primarily finished in white brick, with the rear and one side wall painted black, creating a striking contrast. The front facade features a single door, two upper windows, and a small garden area with potted plants and a tiled entry path. The house has two visible stories, with windows on both levels and a small balcony or planter box extending from the front. The roof is flat and open, suggesting possible rooftop access or use. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and limited decorative elements.
description: A modern, two-story house with a white brick facade, flat roof, and minimalist design, featuring a small front garden and contrasting black side walls.
description_view_0: Side view showing a black-painted wall with a single window and the protruding front planter box.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the main entry door, two upper windows, a small garden, and the white brick facade.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a continuous white brick wall and the extended planter box visible.
description_view_3: Rear view with a black wall and a single window, minimal architectural features.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple entry with a single door, tiled steps, small porch area, and adjacent planter box with potted plants.
